mapper.select: SELECT P.PROJECT_NO, P.REG_EMP_NO, P.DEPT_CD, P.PROJECT_NM, P.PROJECT_DESC, P.PROJECT_STAT_CD, P.START_DTM, P.END_DTM, P.USE_YN, P.MAIN_IMG_PATH, D.DEPT_NM AS DEPT_NM, E.EMP_NM AS REG_EMP_NM, D.DEPT_HEAD_EMP_NO AS DEPT_HEAD_EMP_NO, EH.EMP_NM AS DEPT_HEAD_EMP_NM FROM PROJECT P JOIN DEPT D ON D.DEPT_CD = P.DEPT_CD LEFT JOIN EMP E ON E.EMP_NO = P.REG_EMP_NO LEFT JOIN EMP EH ON EH.EMP_NO = D.DEPT_HEAD_EMP_NO WHERE P.PROJECT_NO = #{projectNo} AND D.DEL_YN = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PROJECT ( PROJECT_NO, REG_EMP_NO, DEPT_CD, PROJECT_NM, PROJECT_DESC, PROJECT_STAT_CD, START_DTM, END_DTM, USE_YN, MAIN_IMG_PATH ) VALUES ( SEQ_PROJECT_NO.NEXTVAL, #{regEmpNo}, #{req.deptCd}, #{req.projectNm}, #{req.projectDesc}, #{req.projectStatCd}, #{req.startDtm}, #{req.endDtm}, #{req.useYn}, NULL )
mapper.update: UPDATE PROJECT SET DEPT_CD = #{req.deptCd}, PROJECT_NM = #{req.projectNm}, PROJECT_DESC = #{req.projectDesc}, PROJECT_STAT_CD = #{req.projectStatCd}, START_DTM = #{req.startDtm}, END_DTM = #{req.endDtm}, USE_YN = #{req.useYn} WHERE PROJECT_NO = #{req.projectNo}
